name: XSS Risk
message: Unsafe use of innerHTML detected. Risk of XSS.
suggestion: Use 'textContent' or 'innerText' instead of 'innerHTML' to prevent cross-site scripting.

name: Unsafe Eval Usage
message: Unsafe function 'eval' detected. Risk of arbitrary code execution.
suggestion: Avoid using 'eval'. Use safer alternatives like 'JSON.parse'.

name: Hardcoded Secret
description: Detects hardcoded API keys or secrets.
message: Potential hardcoded API key or secret detected.
suggestion: Use environment variables or a secret manager to store sensitive information.

name: Nested Loops Performance
description: Detects deeply nested loops (3 or more).
message: Deeply nested loops detected. Potential performance issue.
suggestion: Consider refactoring to reduce nesting or use more efficient data structures.
